## Checklist

- [ ] Linked an issue above (`Closes #N` — or `Refs #N` if partial)
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits (`type(scope): subject`, ≤ 72 chars)
- [ ] Small, focused commits grouped into logical batches
- [ ] App `README.md` updated if behaviour changed (Definition of Done)
- [ ] Architecture decision recorded in `docs/architecture/` (if applicable)
- [ ] User guide updated, EN first then FR (if user-facing)
- [ ] Tests pass / added where relevant
